meaning: vt.紧握,紧夹n.掌握,控制,把手v.抓住
examples: He kept a tight grip on her arm.
She tightened her grip on his arm.
Grip the rope as tightly as you can.
And how will it break Qualcomm's continuing grip on smartphone audio in the US?
The LSE has fought tooth and nail to keep away from the grip of the Nasdaq.
